headline: Is Cognizant Technology Solutions Corporation (CTSH) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is CTSH a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Cognizant Technology Solutions Corporation on Quality Value Investing’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on CTSH. Cognizant Technology Solutions Corporation’s share was trading at $51.87 as of May 5th. CTSH’s trailing and forward P/E were 11.25 and 9.18 respectively […]
